title: Payment deducted but order not confirmed
content: If payment is deducted but order is not confirmed, advise the user to wait up to 24 hours for auto-reconciliation. If the order is not created after 24 hours, initiate a refund. Check payment gateway logs before proceeding.
resolution_steps: Check transaction status in payment gateway

title: Refund processing time
content: Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days after initiation. Delays may occur due to bank processing times.
resolution_steps: Inform SLA and provide reference ID

title: Order delivery delayed
content: If an order is delayed, check the courier tracking status. If the shipment is stuck for more than 48 hours, raise a logistics escalation ticket.
resolution_steps: Escalate if >48 hours with no movement

title: Unable to login / account blocked
content: For login issues, guide the user to reset password. If account is blocked, verify identity and unblock via admin panel.

title: Cancel order
content: Orders can be cancelled before shipment. If already shipped, cancellation is not possible; advise return after delivery.

title: Return process
content: Users can initiate a return within 7 days of delivery. Pickup is scheduled within 48 hours after request.

title: Unable to pay / payment authorization failed
content: When a payment is declined or fails at authorization, first check the transaction status for the order. If the order was not created and the transaction is failed, recommend retrying using a different payment method and confirm the order will be created only after successful authorization. If the order is still missing after 24 hours, initiate a refund as per policy.
resolution_steps: Check transaction status in the payment gateway for the provided order id
Verify whether the order was created/confirmed
If authorization failed and the order is missing, recommend retrying with another payment method
If the order is still not confirmed after 24 hours, initiate a refund and share the refund reference
